mechanism_narrative: Higher 3-month growth in RSAFS signals stabilizing household demand and improving near-term revenue expectations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days when the signal is measured continuously.
failure_condition: Reject if the coefficient on 3-month RSAFS growth is not positive in walk-forward tests or if Rank IC is below 0.03 over two consecutive 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid rise in UNRATE signals accelerating labor-market slack, weaker household income, and lower earnings expectations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage point over 3 months
regime_hint: recession or early post-shock labor deterioration
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of cases or if the mean triggered return is not below the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is pinned near the zero lower bound and CPIAUCSL is not falling over 3 months, policy remains highly accommodative while deflation risk recedes, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses below 0.25% and CPIAUCSL 3-month change is greater than or equal to 0
failure_condition: Reject if triggered zero-lower-bound non-deflation episodes do not have higher 60-day returns than other zero-lower-bound episodes or if the return spread is negative.

mechanism_narrative: A turn in INDPRO from contraction to expansion signals that the inventory cycle has bottomed and cyclical earnings revisions improve, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO 3-month change crosses above 0 after being negative for at least 6 months
regime_hint: post-shock recovery and inventory restocking phase
failure_condition: Reject if the 5-day event-window return after triggered INDPRO turns is not positive on average or if hit rate is below 50% in walk-forward evaluation.

mechanism_narrative: Persistently depressed HOUST signals weak residential investment, credit stress, and negative wealth effects, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days when housing fails to rebound.
candidate_trigger: HOUST remains below its 12-month moving average and its 3-month change is less than 0
regime_hint: housing-led recession or balance-sheet repair period
failure_condition: Reject if triggered weak-housing periods have 60-day returns above the unconditional mean or if the negative return differential is not stable across rolling 5-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: When PAYEMS declines and UNRATE rises at the same time, labor income and confidence contract jointly, creating an earnings drag that produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month change is below 0 and UNRATE 3-month change is above 0
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS-down and UNRATE-up trigger does not underperform either single-series trigger, or if triggered 20-day returns are positive in more than 55% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: A CPIAUCSL inflation acceleration without a matching FEDFUNDS increase signals falling real policy rates and future tightening risk, raising discount-rate uncertainty and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 6-month annualized growth crosses above 3% while FEDFUNDS 3-month change is less than or equal to 0
regime_hint: inflation-scare regime with policy behind the curve
failure_condition: Reject if triggered inflation-acceleration episodes have nonnegative average 20-day excess returns versus baseline or if the interaction term has the wrong sign in walk-forward regressions.

mechanism_narrative: Deeply negative GDPC1 growth signals broad demand contraction and declining aggregate profits, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days after the contraction is visible in released GDP data.
evidence_refs: fact:latest available GDPC1 snapshot value was 11340.9
regime_hint: confirmed recession with broad demand contraction
failure_condition: Reject if GDPC1 contraction triggers fail to predict below-average 60-day returns in out-of-sample tests or if the signal coefficient is positive in two consecutive rolling windows.
